page_metadata.biotools__summary: SBML2Modelica is a tool which translates biochemical models written in System Biology Markup Language (SBML) Version 3 Level 2 into well-structured, user-intelligible, easily-modifiable Modelica models.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SBML2Modelica is a tool which translates biochemical models written in System Biology Markup Language (SBML) Version 3 Level 2 into well-structured, user-intelligible, easily-modifiable Modelica models.
